instructions.original_snippets: Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY before invoking the generation script; NEVER hardcode the key in the script or task file.
Select the --doc-type flag matching the target venue (journal=8.5, conference=8.0, poster=7.0) to apply the correct quality threshold.
NEVER request more than 2 iterations; the smart-iteration system stops early if quality is already above threshold.
ALWAYS verify the output image exists and meets the quality threshold before referencing it in a manuscript.
Store all generated diagrams under figures/ and reference them with relative paths to keep the project portable.
NEVER use the generation script for decorative or non-scientific images — this tool targets publication-quality scientific diagrams only.
Describe the diagram in precise scientific language; vague prompts produce generic output that fails quality review.
